case_title: BRANDON FREEMAN VS. SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $265.00 FILED BY FREEMAN, BRANDON AS TO DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-26-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY FREEMAN, BRANDON SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KAREN D. VICKERS--DIRECTOR, RISK SERVICES AND PATIENT RELATIONS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, BRANDON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:RICK GROSSMAN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, BRANDON AS TO DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, BRANDON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BEYOND A PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE THAT THE HOSPITAL IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE LOSS OF HIS MONEY AND PERSONAL ITEMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
